description_long: This is a round, metallic plate with a wide, slightly sloped rim and a shallow central basin. The rim is adorned with intricate, raised decorative patterns, including floral motifs and possibly some text or symbols. The center of the plate features a detailed embossed scene, likely depicting a historical or mythological event with human figures and possibly animals. The surface has a dark, aged patina, giving it an antique appearance. The plate appears to be made of pewter or a similar metal, with a solid and weighty construction. Its ornate design suggests it may be used for decorative purposes or as a ceremonial serving piece.
description: A round, ornate metallic plate with embossed decorative patterns and a central scene, finished in a dark, antique patina.
description_view_0: The plate's rim and central embossed scene are clearly visible, with the decorative motifs and figures most prominent from this angle.
description_view_1: This view highlights the depth of the central basin and the three-dimensional relief of the figures in the center.
description_view_2: The plate's rim patterns are more visible here, with the central scene partially obscured by the angle.
description_view_3: The embossed figures in the center are seen from a different perspective, emphasizing the plate's shallow depth and ornate rim.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative embossed patterns and a central scene are visible on the rim and basin.
